'''Void Station''' was a [[palace]]-like [[Space station/Legends|space station]] built on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], located near an [[Unidentified planet (Void Station)|unidentified]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==History==
It was the home of the [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] and newly-motivated [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] named [[Jib Kopatha]]. He employed a number of workers and [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Gender/Legends|girls]] here, including the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Xora]] and [[Zuur]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] {{1st}}
*[[Empire 24|''Empire'' 24]]
*[[Empire 25|''Empire'' 25]]
